articles.title: WELCOME TO THE NEW ERA OF AGENTIC COMMERCE.
articles.summary: PayPal is leading the agentic commerce revolution by providing developers and merchants with innovative tools, including the industry's first remote MCP server and PayPal Agent Toolkit, to create next-generation shopping experiences. Developers can now enable sophisticated agentic AI experiences, all powered by PayPal.

articles.title: > Get started today at PayPal.ai
> Connect fast with PayPal's MCP Server
articles.summary: > Integrate with PayPal APIs with AI frameworks in PayPal's Agent

articles.title: Toolkit
GPT-4O ROLLBACK
articles.summary: OpenAI has rolled back a recent update to GPT-4o that introduced overly agreeable behavior and is now refining personalization and feedback mechanisms.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC'S TAKE ON EXPORT CONTROLS FOR AI CHIPS
articles.summary: Anthropic supports strong export controls to secure America's compute lead, highlighting the national security stakes of advanced chip diffusion.

articles.title: META'S PROTECTION TOOLS FOR AI
articles.summary: Meta launched new tools to help secure open source AI systems, including privacy-preserving infrastructure and threat detection for model deployment.

articles.title: UNDERSTANDING DATA AT SCALE
articles.summary: Meta manages vast, complex data ecosystems by embedding privacy considerations early in development and creating a unified privacy taxonomy to streamline compliance.

articles.title: TEACHING LLMS SOLID MODELING FOR NEXT-GEN DESIGN TOOLS
articles.summary: Researchers trained LLMs to generate accurate solid models from text prompts. The method improved geometric accuracy over previous approaches.

articles.title: MCPS, GATEKEEPERS, AND THE FUTURE OF MUSIC LICENSING
articles.summary: MCPs face criticism for slow, opaque licensing processes. This article called for reforms to support independent music creators.

articles.title: GET YOUR PORTCOS IN FRONT OF 6+ MILLION TECH PROFESSIONALS
articles.summary: Get your B2B SaaS portcos instant access to millions of tech professionals across our 12 interest-based newsletters. Additional perks (i.e., discounts) are included when you sign up as a VC partner [13].

articles.title: LLM BENCHMARKING FOR GLOBAL HEALTH
articles.summary: This article from Google discusses a new benchmark that uses synthetic personas to evaluate LLMs in diagnosing tropical and infectious diseases.

articles.title: MODULATING REASONING IN LLMS
articles.summary: Researchers show that reasoning performance in LLMs can be adjusted via simple interventions in the residual stream using representation-based control vectors.

articles.title: A TOOL FOR LIDAR ANNOTATION
articles.summary: SALT is a semi-automatic labeling tool designed for LiDAR point clouds that offers strong zero-shot adaptability across different sensors and scenes while maintaining 4D consistency.

articles.title: MEGA MATH DATASET (HUGGING FACE HUB)
articles.summary: Over 300B tokens of highly curated math questions and answers for training.

articles.title: PERPLEXITY'S CEO DISCUSSES COMPETING WITH GOOGLE AND THE AI BROWSER WAR
articles.summary: Perplexity's CEO has outlined strategies to challenge Google in AI search and browsers. He predicts tougher competition as AI-native browsers reshape the market.

articles.title: AI EXCELS AT GEO-GUESSING WITH MINIMAL VISUAL CLUES
articles.summary: New AI models identified locations from subtle image details with high accuracy. Researchers warned this could impact privacy and raise security concerns.

articles.title: GEMINI ADDS AI IMAGE EDITING
articles.summary: Google has expanded AI editing to the Gemini app, allowing users to modify personal images with multi-step tools and text-image interactions.

articles.title: YOUTUBE TESTS ITS OWN VERSION OF AI OVERVIEWS
articles.summary: YouTube has started testing AI Overviews to summarize video content for users.

articles.title: GMAIL APP ADDS GEMINI IMAGE GENERATOR AND NEW WORKSPACE FEATURES
articles.summary: Google updated the Gmail app with the Gemini image generator and new Workspace tools.
